perf_hint: four edge terms and one noise read per pixel — among the cheapest presets; the resolution is the only cost

params.name: sides
params.description: Which edges the veil hangs from; `horizontal` is left and right, `vertical` top and bottom.

params.name: reach
params.description: How far the resting veil reaches into the frame.

params.name: breathe
params.description: How much the loudness deepens the veil's reach.

params.name: softness
params.description: How long the veil's feather is; 0 is a crisp border of light.

params.name: texture
params.description: How much gauze grain the veil carries; 0 is a clean gradient.

params.name: lift
params.description: How much a hit lifts the veil, gently.

params.name: hue
params.description: Where on the palette the veil's light sits.

params.name: brightness
params.description: How much light the loudness of the song puts into the veil.
